popularStory.headline: Cicely Willoughby Sutton - Find-a-grave
popularStory.description:
Baron Edward Sutton (Dudley )and Cicely Willowghby were married about 1480.


Their children born in Dudley, Worcestershire.

Eleanor Dudley born about 1481.

Jane (Joan) Dudley born about 1483.

Marg …

zh.Boston, Lincolnshire, England: 英國林可爾史爾波斯頓
zh.lifeSummary: 當Cecily Willoughby於1463年出生在英國林可爾史爾波斯頓時，她的父親Sir William Willoughby31歲，母親Joan Strangways36歲。她於大約1480年與Lord Edmund Sutton 2nd Baron Dudley在英國英格蘭武斯特斯爾杜德利結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和9個女兒的父母。她去世於1539年8月1日在英國武斯特斯爾杜德利杜德利 卡素享年76歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Cecily Willoughby于1463年出生在英国林可爾史爾波斯頓时，她的父亲Sir William Willoughby31岁，母亲Joan Strangways36岁。她于大约1480年与Lord Edmund Sutton 2nd Baron Dudley在英国英格兰武斯特斯爾杜德利结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和9个女儿的父母。她去世于1539年8月1日在英国武斯特斯爾杜德利杜德利 卡素享年76岁。

nameMeanings.name: Willoughby
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of various places called Willoughby, for example in Leicestershire, Lincolnshire, Nottinghamshire, and Warwickshire. They are named from an Old English +wilig ‘willow’ + Old Norse bȳ ‘farmstead, village’.

variants.name: Wilby
meanings: habitational name from any of the places called Wilby, in Suffolk, Norfolk, and Northamptonshire. The first placename is probably named from an Old English wilig ‘willow’ + Old English bēag ‘circle, ring’; the Norfolk placename derives from Old English wilig + bēag or Old Norse bý ‘farmstead, village’; the Northamptonshire placename derives from the Old Norse personal name Vili + bý.
Redmonds has demonstrated that in the parish of Hipperholme, and subsequently elsewhere in Yorkshire, Wilby occurs as a variant of Willoughby .

nameMeanings.name: Cecily
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Medieval vernacular English form of   Cecilia .

variants.name: Cecilie
meanings: Medieval vernacular English form of   Cecilia .

variants.name: Cicely
meanings: Variant of   Cecily .  This was a common form of the name in the Middle Ages, and in the 20th century was well known as the name of the British actress and singer  Cicely Courtneidge  (  1893–1980 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Cecily Willoughby was born in 1463, in Boston, Lincolnshire, England, her father, Sir William Willoughby, was 31 and her mother, Joan Strangways, was 36. She married Lord Edmund Sutton 2nd Baron Dudley about 1480, in Dudley, Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 9 daughters. She died on 1 August 1539, in Dudley Castle, Dudley, Worcestershire, England, at the age of 76.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Cecily Willoughby est née en 1463, à Boston, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir William Willoughby, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Joan Strangways, avait 36 ans. Elle a épousé Lord Edmund Sutton 2nd Baron Dudley environ 1480, à Dudley, Worcestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 9 filles. Elle est décédée le 1 août 1539, à Dudley Castle, Dudley, Worcestershire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 76 ans.

ko.Dudley Castle, Worcestershire, England: 영국 잉글랜드 워스스터실르 드들리 드들리 카스틀
ko.lifeSummary: Cecily Willoughby(이)가 1463년 영국 링코실르 보스턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir William Willoughby(은)는 31세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Joan Strangways(은)는 36세였다. 그녀는 대략 1480년 영국 잉글랜드 워스스터실르 드들리에서 Lord Edmund Sutton 2nd Baron Dudley(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 아홉 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1539년 8월 1일 영국 워스스터실르 드들리 드들리 카스틀에서 76세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Cecily Willoughby nasceu em 1463, em Boston, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir William Willoughby, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Joan Strangways, tinha 36 anos. Ela casou-se com Lord Edmund Sutton 2nd Baron Dudley aproximadamente 1480, em Dudley, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 9 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1 de agosto de 1539, em Dudley Castle, Dudley, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, com 76 anos.

ru.Dudley Castle, Worcestershire, England: дудли кастл, дудли, ворсестиршир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Cecily Willoughby родилась в 1463 г. в местности бостон, линколншир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir William Willoughby было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Joan Strangways, 36. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Lord Edmund Sutton 2nd Baron Dudley около 1480 г. в местности дудли, ворсестиршир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 9 дочерей. Она умерла 1 августа 1539 г. в местности дудли кастл, дудли, ворсестиршир, Англия в возрасте 76 лет.
